description_long: This house features a flat, sand-colored exterior with a rooftop terrace accessible by an exterior staircase. The structure is adorned with wooden doors and small, rectangular windows, and is surrounded by various clay pots, barrels, and woven baskets. A wooden pergola and a well are present on the rooftop, while the ground level includes a shaded work area with benches and a ladder leading to the roof. Green vines drape over one side, adding a touch of natural color to the otherwise earthy palette. The house is compact, with utilitarian outdoor spaces for storage and daily activities, reflecting a traditional, possibly Middle Eastern or Mediterranean architectural influence. The overall design emphasizes practicality, with open-air features and minimal ornamentation.
description: A compact, flat-roofed house with sand-colored walls, wooden doors, rooftop terrace, and outdoor workspaces, accented by clay pots and green vines.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main door, exterior staircase, rooftop terrace with a well, and a shaded workbench area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rooftop pergola, clay pots, a ladder, and a small window, with vines cascading down the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the ladder, more storage vessels, a woven basket, and a dense cluster of outdoor items and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the full length of the exterior staircase, additional benches, and various clay and metal containers.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door at ground level with adjacent steps and minimal decorative elements
